title: hemerocallis kwanso
intro: Hemerocallis kwanso, also known as the Daylily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Hemerocallidaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and easing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the Daylily plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
